subcodes.first_line: God remembereth His servant from the precincts of eternity, the Spot wherefrom the Tongue of God uttereth the most wondrous melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده عن شطر البقا مقر الذی ینطق فیه لسان الله بابدع النغمات لیکون
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
